title: AVA Run Manifest
description: Contract schema for manifest.json — the inter-agent communication backbone of the AVA platform. Every agent MUST validate this schema before reading or writing. Fields are dot-namespaced into phases, outputs, and metrics sections. Atomic writes (tmp→rename) are required for all updates.

rundir.description: Absolute path to the per-run working directory. All relative paths in outputs.* are relative to this directory.

run_id.description: Unique identifier for this run. Convention: seed_<N>_<YYYYMMDD_HHMMSS>.

isa.description: RISC-V ISA string. Must match Spike --isa argument.

seed.description: Random seed used for this run. Reproducibility requirement: re-running with same seed must produce identical outputs.

phases.description: Per-phase lifecycle tracking. Each agent writes to its own phase key.

semantic.description: Agent A: RTL semantic analysis phase.

simulation.description: Agent B+C+D: RTL + ISS tandem simulation phase.

coverage.description: Agent F (coverage_pipeline.py): Coverage extraction and analysis phase.

outputs.description: Paths to artifacts produced by each agent, relative to rundir.

coverageraw.description: Directory containing raw Verilator coverage.dat files.

coveragesummary.description: AVA inter-agent coverage summary (coveragesummary.json). Written by Agent F.

commitlog_rtl.description: Newline-delimited JSON file of RTL commit log entries (commitlog.schema.json).

commitlog_iss.description: Newline-delimited JSON file of ISS commit log entries (commitlog.schema.json).

bug_report.description: JSON list of BugReport objects from the differential comparator.

cold_path_ranking.description: JSON list of ranked cold paths from ColdPathRanker.

metrics.description: Key scalar metrics written by agents; readable by all.

coveragepct.description: Weighted functional coverage % (written by Agent F).

coverage_plateau.description: True when Mann-Kendall trend test detects stalled coverage.

bug_count.description: Number of RTL vs ISS mismatches found.

ipc.description: Instructions per cycle from RTL simulation.
